summary: First-finish smoke testing of Anuj Biswas portfolio (FastAPI + React). Backend contact API, frontend rendering, theme toggle, hero CTAs, contact form happy-path, resume download, mobile menu all verified working end-to-end.
passed: POST /api/contact valid -> 201 with id+created_at, persisted in MongoDB
All 8 portfolio sections render (hero, about, skills, now-learning, projects, education, achievements, goals, contact)
Theme toggle adds 'dark' class to <html> (persists in document state)
Hero CTA 'View Projects' scrolls to projects-section (visible in viewport)
Hero CTA 'Contact Me' scrolls to contact-section (visible in viewport)
Contact form happy-path: fill name/email/message -> sonner toast 'Message sent' shown, form cleared, message stored (GET /api/contact count incremented)
Mobile viewport (390x844): mobile-menu-button visible, opens 6 mobile nav links

failed.issue: Empty submit produced no detectable inline error elements via .error/[class*=error]/[role=alert] selectors. Backend correctly rejects (422), but client-visible error messages were not detected in the standard error containers.
failed.evidence: Empty submit click -> Validation errors on empty submit: []. Likely uses Tailwind 'text-red-*' classes without 'error' substring or role=alert.

failed.issue: Theme toggle works (html class toggles to 'dark') but localStorage key for 'theme'/'vite-ui-theme'/'ui-theme' returned None. Persistence across reload was not re-verified.
failed.evidence: localStorage theme: None after toggle. Behavior may use a different key; not a blocker.

action_items: Optional: confirm contact form renders visible inline error messages on empty/invalid submit (add role=alert or class containing 'error' for testability).
Optional: verify theme persists across page reload (confirm localStorage key name).
